---
title: "Essays"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "essay_1.qmd"
    - "*/index.qmd"         # This looks at all files in the current folder
  sort: "date asc"   # Newest first
  type: grid       # Options: default, table, or grid
  categories: true    # Adds a sidebar with tags/categories
image: images/dog.png  
---
